attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
W_GTC_ITEM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM, 
W_GTC_ITEM.SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_APPROVED_DT, 
W_GTC_ITEM.GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT, 
W_GTC_ITEM.DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_DESCR, 
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_TYPE, 
W_GTC_ITEM.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,  
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD, 
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT, 
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG, 
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID, 
W_GTC_ITEM.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
W_GTC_ITEM.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
W_GTC_ITEM.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
W_GTC_ITEM.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME, 
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
W_GTC_ITEM.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,
W_GTC_ITEM.DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
W_GTC_ITEM.RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
W_GTC_ITEM.ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
W_GTC_ITEM.ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
W_GTC_ITEM.PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.AUDIT_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.DASHBOARD_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
W_GTC_ITEM.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
W_GTC_ITEM.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
W_GTC_ITEM.WORKBENCH_FLG,
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
W_GTC_ITEM.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
W_GTC_ITEM.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID,
W_GTC_ITEM.START_TV_DTM,
W_GTC_ITEM.END_TV_DTM
FROM
 $$WORKDB.W_GTC_ITEM
 WHERE	DML_TYPE='I'
AND NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1
  FROM   $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TV TV
  WHERE  TV.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM = W_GTC_ITEM.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM
AND TV.START_TV_DTM = W_GTC_ITEM.START_TV_DTM)

SELECT 
TV.BK_GTC_ITEM_NUM, 
TV.SOFTWARE_CATEGORY_CD,
TV.SK_ITEM_ID_INT,
TV.ITEM_REQUESTED_DT,
TV.ITEM_APPROVED_DT, 
TV.GENUINE_MSMTCH_ITEM_SPCFC_FLG,
TV.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CD,
TV.MANUFACTURING_KIT_FLG,
TV.FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT, 
TV.DEACTIVATED_ROLE,
TV.ITEM_DESCR, 
TV.ITEM_TYPE, 
TV.BK_CUSTOMS_ITEM_SRC_SYSTEM_CD,  
TV.ITEM_APRVR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
TV.ITEM_RQSTR_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
TV.RU_DACTVTD_CISCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY, 
TV.RU_ITEM_CLASS_CD, 
TV.RU_ITEM_DEACTIVATED_DT, 
TV.RU_CUSTOM_KIT_FLG, 
TV.RU_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID, 
TV.EDW_CREATE_DTM, 
TV.EDW_CREATE_USER, 
TV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
TV.EDW_UPDATE_USER,
TV.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_REQUESTOR_NAME, 
TV.SRC_RPRTD_ITEM_APPROVER_NAME,
TV.RU_BASED_ON_GTC_ITEM_NUM,
TV.BK_GTC_ITEM_TYPE_CD,
TV.BK_ITEM_TYPE_CODE ,
TV.DV_BASE_PID_GROUP_ID,
TV.RU_DV_CMPNT_REV_PRDT_GRP_ID,
TV.ENTERPRISE_MERGED_FLG,
TV.MANUALLY_IMPORTED_FLG,
TV.CUSTOMS_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
TV.ERP_ITEM_SPECIFIC_KEY,
TV.PRODUCT_STATUS_CD,
TV.AUDIT_FLG,
TV.GLOBAL_PRICE_LIST_FLG,
TV.LINE_OF_BUSINESS_CATEGORY_CD,
TV.KEYWORD_REVIEW_FLG,
TV.DASHBOARD_FLG,
TV.REASON_ITEM_OR_HTS_MISSING_CD,
TV.ITEM_RMVD_FROM_WORKBENCH_DT,
TV.DELIVERY_OPTION_CD,
TV.DV_SRC_CREATED_BY_DT,
TV.WORKBENCH_FLG,
TV.SRC_CREATED_BY_DTM,
TV.SRC_UPDATED_BY_DTM,
TV.DV_SRC_UPDATED_BY_DT,
TV.SRC_UPDATED_BY_USER_ID,
TV.SRC_CREATED_BY_USER_ID
FROM  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GTC_ITEM_TV TV
WHERE  END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
